rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow users to select between full and half power levels.
The system shall have a numeric keypad for inputting the cooking time.
The system shall allow users to start and stop cooking.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows users to select power level (full or half)
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Select the power level (either half power or full power).

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system has a numeric keypad for inputting cooking time
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Input the cooking time using a numeric keypad.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows users to start and stop cooking
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Press Start and the food is cooked for the given time.
